title: Future time markers
subtitle: Make future plans clearer.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: I will call you tomorrow morning.
我明天早上给你打电话。
We are going to meet next Friday.
你什么时候给我打电话？
I will call you tomorrow morning.
我明天早上给你打电话。

items.en: I will call you tomorrow morning.
items.zh: 我明天早上给你打电话。

items.en: We are going to meet next Friday.

items.zh: 你什么时候给我打电话？

items.en: I will call you tomorrow morning.
items.zh: 我明天早上给你打电话。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你什么时候给我打电话？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I will call you tomorrow morning.
lines.zh: 我明天早上给你打电话。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: We are going to meet next Friday.

items.en: I will call you tomorrow morning.
items.zh: 我明天早上给你打电话。

items.en: We are going to meet next Friday.
Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
